data.title: RED test: Create test-artifact-versions.sh with session-start notification scenarios
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create tests/scripts/test-artifact-versions.sh with test functions covering all 7 scenarios from the story done definitions. All tests will FAIL (RED) until the check-artifact-versions.sh implementation task is complete.

### Test functions to add:
- test_all_current_silent_exit: run check-artifact-versions.sh with all 4 artifacts stamped at current version → assert silent exit (no output, exit 0)
- test_one_stale_notification: one artifact stamped at older version → assert one-line notice naming the stale artifact
- test_all_stale_notification: all 4 artifacts at older version → assert notice listing all stale artifacts
- test_legacy_artifact_notification: artifact with no stamp at all → assert notice with legacy/migration message
- test_cache_hit_skips_reads: cache valid (matching version, age < 24h) → assert no artifact files are read (test via absence of grep/read operations on artifact paths)
- test_cache_bust_on_version_change: cache has version X, plugin.json has version Y, age < 24h → assert cache is busted and full re-check fires
- test_plugin_source_repo_silent_exit: plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json exists in CWD → assert silent exit
- test_fail_open_on_unreadable_plugin: plugin.json missing or unreadable → assert exit 0 (no crash)

### Test approach (Given/When/Then):
- Given: isolated temp directory simulating a host project with stamped artifacts and a check cache
- When: check-artifact-versions.sh is invoked with controlled environment
- Then: script outputs expected notification (or silence) and exits with expected code

### Files to create
- tests/scripts/test-artifact-versions.sh

### Fuzzy match note
Source: check-artifact-versions.sh → normalized: checkartifactversionssh
Test: test-artifact-versions.sh → normalized: testartifactversionssh
Fuzzy match FAILS (checkartifactversionssh not substring of testartifactversionssh)
→ .test-index entry REQUIRED

## File Impact
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| tests/scripts/test-artifact-versions.sh | create |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) — RED-marked tests are tolerated
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-artifact-versions.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 8 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_all_current\|test_one_stale\|test_all_stale\|test_legacy\|test_cache_hit\|test_cache_bust\|test_plugin_source\|test_fail_open' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-artifact-versions.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 8)}'
- [ ] `.test-index` updated with RED markers for each test function
  Verify: grep -c '\[test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | awk '{exit ($1 < 8)}'
- [ ] `.test-index` entry maps check-artifact-versions.sh to test-artifact-versions.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'check-artifact-versions' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index

## Escalation Policy
Proceed unless a significant assumption is required. Document all assumptions.
